zh.Lavendon, Buckinghamshire, England: 英國巴金哈姆爾拉文登

zh.Buckinghamshire, England, United Kingdom: 英國英格蘭巴金哈姆爾
zh.lifeSummary: 當John de Bidun於大約1128年出生在英國巴金哈姆爾拉文登時，他的父親Hanelade de Bidun40歲，母親Agnes FitzJohn59歲。他於大約1154年與Alice Mauduit在英國巴金哈姆爾拉文登結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和5個女兒的父母。他於1154年在英國英格蘭巴金哈姆爾被列為sheriff of buckinghamshire 。他去世於大約1180年在他的家鄉享年54歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当John de Bidun于大约1128年出生在英国巴金哈姆爾拉文登时，他的父亲Hanelade de Bidun40岁，母亲Agnes FitzJohn59岁。他于大约1154年与Alice Mauduit在英国巴金哈姆爾拉文登结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和5个女儿的父母。他于1154年在英国英格兰巴金哈姆爾被列为sheriff of buckinghamshire 。他去世于大约1180年在他的家乡享年54岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Bidun
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (Hampshire and Surrey): habitational name, probably from Baydon (Wiltshire). The placename may have meant ‘hill associated with a woman named Bēage’ (a personal name derived from Old English bēag ‘ring, bracelet, torque’ + Old English dūn). The surname is pronounced /'baidən/.

History: The surname Biden has a long history in East Meon (Hampshire), recorded there from 1327 until at least the 1840s. — Joe Biden, the 46th president of the US, is of Irish, English, and French descent. His mother’s Jean (Catherine Eugenia) Finnegan entire family tree traces back to Ireland, with some of the ancestors named Blewitt (see Blewett ).

variants.name: Blewett
meanings: English and Irish (of Norman origin): nickname from Old French bleuet, blouet ‘bluish’, a diminutive of bleu ‘blue’, more specifically ‘pale, pallid, wan’, or ‘fair-haired, golden-haired’. Compare Blew , Blewitt , and Bluett .

History: The Norman Ralph Bloet is mentioned in Domesday Book (1086) as lord of the manor of Hinton in Hampshire, recorded in 1246 as Henton Bluet (modern Hinton Blewett). From the late 12th century onward many Anglo-Norman knights acquired estates in Ireland. Ralph's presumed descendants, Thomas and Ralph Bluet, held lands in counties Cork and Limerick before and after 1254, and are ancestors of the modern Irish families named Bluett, Blewett, and Blewitt. In 1850, following the Irish Potato Famine in Ireland (1845–49), Patrick Blewitt, a son of Edward Blewitt of Ballina, County Mayo, migrated to North America, his whole family joining him in 1851 to settle in Scranton PA. Joe Biden (see Biden ), the 46th president of the US, is Edward's great-great-great grandson.

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Contracted form of Old French Jo(h)anne, from Latin Io(h)anna ( see Joanna ). In England this was the usual feminine form of John from the Middle English period onwards and was extremely popular, but in the 16th and 17th centuries it steadily lost ground to Jane . It was strongly revived in the first part of the 20th century, partly under the influence of George Bernard Shaw's play St Joan ( 1923 ), based on the life of Joan of Arc ( 1412–31 ). Claiming to be guided by the voices of the saints, she persuaded the French dauphin to defy the occupying English forces and have himself crowned, and she led the French army that raised the siege of Orleans in 1429 . The following year she was captured by the Burgundians and sold to the English, and a year later she was burned at the stake for witchcraft at the age of 18 or 19. Her story has captured the imagination of many writers, and she is variously portrayed as a national and political hero, a model of apolitical straightforwardness and honesty, and a religious heroine. She was canonized in 1920 . More recent influences have included the American film actress Joan Crawford ( 1908–77 , born Lucille le Sueur ), the British actress Joan Collins ( b. 1933 ), the American comedienne Joan Rivers ( b. 1933 ), and the West Indian pop singer Joan Armatrading ( b. 1950 ).

en.lifeSummary: When John de Bidun was born about 1128, in Lavendon, Buckinghamshire, England, his father, Hanelade de Bidun, was 40 and his mother, Agnes FitzJohn, was 59. He married Alice Mauduit about 1154, in Lavendon, Buckinghamshire, England. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 5 daughters. In 1154, at the age of 27, his occupation is listed as sheriff of buckinghamshire  in Buckinghamshire, England, United Kingdom. He died about 1180, in his hometown, at the age of 54.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque John de Bidun est né environ 1128, à Lavendon, Buckinghamshire, Angleterre, son père, Hanelade de Bidun, avait 40 ans et sa mère, Agnes FitzJohn, avait 59 ans. Il a épousé Alice Mauduit environ 1154, à Lavendon, Buckinghamshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 5 filles. En 1154, à l’âge de 27 ans, sa profession de son indiquée est sheriff of buckinghamshire  à Buckinghamshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Il est décédé environ 1180, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 54 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als John de Bidun um 1128 in Lavendon, Buckinghamshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Hanelade de Bidun 40 und seine Mutter Agnes FitzJohn 59. Er hat um 1154 in Lavendon, Buckinghamshire, England Alice Mauduit geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 5 Töchter. 1154, als er 27 Jahre alt war, war sein Beruf als sheriff of buckinghamshire  in Buckinghamshire, England, United Kingdom aufgeführt. Er starb um 1180 im Alter von 54 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Quando John de Bidun è nato il circa 1128 nel Lavendon, Buckinghamshire, England, il suo padre, Hanelade de Bidun, aveva 40 anni e il suo madre, Agnes FitzJohn, aveva 59 anni. Lui sposato Alice Mauduit circa 1154, nel Lavendon, Buckinghamshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 5 figlie. Nel 1154, all'età di 27 anni, la sua occupazione è indicata come sheriff of buckinghamshire  nel Buckinghamshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Morì circa 1180, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 54 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: John de Bidunが約1128年にイギリスブクインガムシュアイアラベンドンで生まれた時，父Hanelade de Bidunは40歳，母Agnes FitzJohnは59歳であった。約1154年にイギリスブクインガムシュアイアラベンドンでAlice Mauduitと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と5人の娘の親であった。1154年，27歳の時，イギリスイギリスブクインガムシュアイアでの職業はsheriff of buckinghamshire と記録されている。彼は約1180年に故郷で54歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: John de Bidun(이)가 대략 1128년 영국 벅잉함실르 레이븐던에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Hanelade de Bidun(은)는 40세였고, 그의 어머니 Agnes FitzJohn(은)는 59세였다. 그는 대략 1154년 영국 벅잉함실르 레이븐던에서 Alice Mauduit(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 다섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 1154년, 27세의 나이로 그의 직업은 영국 잉글랜드 벅잉함실르에서 sheriff of buckinghamshire 이었다. 그는 대략 1180년 그의 고향에서 54세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando John de Bidun nasceu aproximadamente 1128, em Lavendon, Buckinghamshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Hanelade de Bidun, tinha 40 anos e sua mãe, Agnes FitzJohn, tinha 59 anos. Ele casou-se com Alice Mauduit aproximadamente 1154, em Lavendon, Buckinghamshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 5 filhas. Em 1154, com 27 anos, sua profissão aparece como sheriff of buckinghamshire  em Buckinghamshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Ele faleceu aproximadamente 1180, em sua cidade natal, com 54 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда John de Bidun родился около 1128 г. в местности лавендон, буккингхамшир, Англия, его отцу по имени Hanelade de Bidun было 40 лет, а матери, которую звали Agnes FitzJohn, 59. Он женился на женщине по имени Alice Mauduit около 1154 г. в местности лавендон, буккингхамшир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 5 дочерей. В 1154 году, в возрасте 27 лет,  он работал по профессии sheriff of buckinghamshire  в местности буккингхамшир, Англия, Великобритания. Он умер около 1180 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 54 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando John de Bidun nació aproximadamente 1128, en Lavendon, Buckinghamshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Hanelade de Bidun, tenía 40 años y su mamá, Agnes FitzJohn, tenía 59 años. Se casó con Alice Mauduit aproximadamente 1154, en Lavendon, Buckinghamshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 5 hijas. En 1154, a la edad de 27 años, su ocupación registrada era sheriff of buckinghamshire  en Buckinghamshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Murió aproximadamente 1180, en su pueblo, a la edad de 54 años.
